title: Remove Blindess
description: Removes the blindness effect client side
body:
# FOR AN UPDATED MOD AND A BUNCH OF OTHER FEATURES CHECK OUT [https://modrinth.com/mod/clearviews](https://modrinth.com/mod/clearviews)


This mod removes the blindness effect, if you want a different version, DO NOT request it in the discord, USE CLEARVIEWS PLEASE ITS 1000000 TIMES BETTER I BEG OF YOU.

For more features and updates please refer to [https://modrinth.com/mod/clearviews](https://modrinth.com/mod/clearviews)

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

For a better and more feature-rich mod, check out [clearviews!](https://modrinth.com/mod/clearviews)


Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
